--- title: "Basic Workflow: Model Specification, Bundle, & MCMC" --- > **Legacy vignette (for the website / historical notes).** > These files may not match the current exported API one-to-one. > Last verified: **2026-01-18**. > > For the up-to-date workflow, see the main package vignettes (basic, unconditional, conditional, and causal).. # Workflow Overview DPmixGPD uses a direct two-step workflow: 1. **Bundle** (`build_nimble_bundle`): Generate NIMBLE code and compile the sampler. 2. **MCMC** (`run_mcmc_bundle_manual`): Execute posterior sampling. --- ## Phase 1: Bundle (NIMBLE Code Generation & Compilation) **Purpose**: Generate NIMBLE model code, compile sampler, prepare for MCMC execution. ### Building Directly ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} # Load packaged data data("nc_pos200_k3", package = "DPmixGPD") y <- nc_pos200_k3$y # Direct call bundle_direct <- DPmixGPD::build_nimble_bundle( y = y, kernel = "gamma", backend = "crp", GPD = FALSE, components = 5, mcmc = mcmc ) print("Direct bundle creation successful.\n") ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` [1] "Direct bundle creation successful.\n" ``` ::: ::: ### Inspecting Bundle Contents ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} # Bundle is an S3 object with structure cat("Bundle class:", class(bundle_direct), "\n") ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` Bundle class: dpmixgpd_bundle ``` ::: ```{.r .cell-code} cat("Bundle contains:\n") ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` Bundle contains: ``` ::: ```{.r .cell-code} print(names(bundle_direct)) ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` [1] "spec" "code" "constants" "dimensions" "data" [6] "inits" "monitors" "mcmc" "epsilon" ``` ::: ```{.r .cell-code} # Access key components cat("\nMCMC settings:\n") ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` MCMC settings: ``` ::: ```{.r .cell-code} print(bundle_direct$mcmc_settings) ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` NULL ``` ::: ::: --- ## Phase 3: MCMC Execution **Purpose**: Run posterior sampling from the compiled bundle. ### Basic MCMC Run ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} # Run MCMC fit <- load_or_fit("quickstart-basic-model-compile-run-fit", run_mcmc_bundle_manual(bundle_direct, show_progress = FALSE)) cat("Fit object class:", class(fit), "\n") ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` Fit object class: mixgpd_fit list ``` ::: ```{.r .cell-code} cat("MCMC execution complete. Posterior samples collected.\n") ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` MCMC execution complete. Posterior samples collected. ``` ::: ::: ### Accessing Posterior Samples ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} # Posterior summary print("\n--- POSTERIOR SUMMARY ---\n") ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` [1] "\n--- POSTERIOR SUMMARY ---\n" ``` ::: ```{.r .cell-code} summary(fit) ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` MixGPD summary | backend: Chinese Restaurant Process | kernel: Gamma Distribution | GPD tail: FALSE | epsilon: 0.025 n = 200 | components = 5 Summary Initial components: 5 | Components after truncation: 1 WAIC: 963.248 lppd: -456.908 | pWAIC: 24.716 Summary table
parameter mean sd q0.025 q0.500 q0.975 ess
weights[1] 0.883 0.138 0.474 0.917 1 8.469
alpha 0.457 0.398 0.022 0.354 1.503 42.38
shape[1] 1.161 0.151 0.915 1.159 1.483 14.106
scale[1] 0.265 0.037 0.204 0.266 0.338 25.996
``` ::: ```{.r .cell-code} # Posterior mean parameters in original form params_fit <- params(fit) params_fit ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` Posterior mean parameters $alpha [1] "0.457" $w [1] "0.883" $shape [1] "1.161" $scale [1] "0.265" ``` ::: ::: ### Diagnostic Plots ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} # Trace plots safe_plot(fit, params = "alpha|beta", family = c("traceplot", "running", "autocorrelation")) ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stderr} ``` Scale for colour is already present. Adding another scale for colour, which will replace the existing scale. Scale for colour is already present. Adding another scale for colour, which will replace the existing scale. ``` ::: ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](basic-model-compile-run_files/figure-html/mcmc-diagnostics-1.png){width=672} ::: ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](basic-model-compile-run_files/figure-html/mcmc-diagnostics-2.png){width=672} ::: ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](basic-model-compile-run_files/figure-html/mcmc-diagnostics-3.png){width=672} ::: ::: --- ## Complete Workflow: End-to-End Example ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} # Load packaged data data("nc_pos200_k3", package = "DPmixGPD") y_data <- nc_pos200_k3$y # PHASE 1: Bundle bundle_final <- DPmixGPD::build_nimble_bundle( y = y_data, kernel = "gamma", backend = "crp", GPD = FALSE, components = 5, mcmc = mcmc ) # PHASE 2: MCMC fit_final <- load_or_fit("quickstart-basic-model-compile-run-fit_final", run_mcmc_bundle_manual(bundle_final, show_progress = FALSE)) print("\n=== THREE-PHASE WORKFLOW COMPLETE ===\n") ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` [1] "\n=== THREE-PHASE WORKFLOW COMPLETE ===\n" ``` ::: ```{.r .cell-code} summary(fit_final) ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` MixGPD summary | backend: Chinese Restaurant Process | kernel: Gamma Distribution | GPD tail: FALSE | epsilon: 0.025 n = 200 | components = 5 Summary Initial components: 5 | Components after truncation: 2 WAIC: 906.001 lppd: -382.021 | pWAIC: 70.979 Summary table
parameter mean sd q0.025 q0.500 q0.975 ess
weights[1] 0.544 0.074 0.408 0.54 0.681 20.835
weights[2] 0.358 0.077 0.187 0.37 0.48 22.198
alpha 0.607 0.389 0.134 0.519 1.59 104.174
shape[1] 2.091 0.573 1.344 2.135 3.367 14.987
shape[2] 2.805 0.895 1.179 2.992 4.062 11.818
scale[1] 0.583 0.298 0.28 0.43 1.17 19.365
scale[2] 1.032 0.644 0.304 0.844 2.226 4.07
``` ::: ::: --- ## Backend Comparison: CRP vs Stick-Breaking ### CRP Backend ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} # Chinese Restaurant Process bundle_crp <- DPmixGPD::build_nimble_bundle( y = y_data, kernel = "gamma", backend = "crp", components = 5, mcmc = mcmc ) fit_crp <- load_or_fit("quickstart-basic-model-compile-run-fit_crp", run_mcmc_bundle_manual(bundle_crp, show_progress = FALSE)) print("CRP execution complete.\n") ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` [1] "CRP execution complete.\n" ``` ::: ::: ### Stick-Breaking Backend ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} # Stick-Breaking Process bundle_sb <- DPmixGPD::build_nimble_bundle( y = y_data, kernel = "gamma", backend = "sb", components = 5, mcmc = mcmc ) fit_sb <- load_or_fit("quickstart-basic-model-compile-run-fit_sb", run_mcmc_bundle_manual(bundle_sb, show_progress = FALSE)) print("SB execution complete.\n") ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` [1] "SB execution complete.\n" ``` ::: ::: --- ## Kernel Selection Guide ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} kernels_available <- c("gamma", "lognormal", "normal", "laplace", "invgauss", "amoroso", "cauchy") cat("Available kernels:\n") ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` Available kernels: ``` ::: ```{.r .cell-code} for (k in kernels_available) { cat(" -", k, "\n") } ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` - gamma - lognormal - normal - laplace - invgauss - amoroso - cauchy ``` ::: ```{.r .cell-code} print("\nChoose kernel based on:\n") ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` [1] "\nChoose kernel based on:\n" ``` ::: ```{.r .cell-code} print(" gamma: Right-skewed, positive support\n") ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` [1] " gamma: Right-skewed, positive support\n" ``` ::: ```{.r .cell-code} print(" lognormal: Log-transformed normality\n") ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` [1] " lognormal: Log-transformed normality\n" ``` ::: ```{.r .cell-code} print(" normal: Symmetric, unbounded\n") ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` [1] " normal: Symmetric, unbounded\n" ``` ::: ```{.r .cell-code} print(" laplace: Sharp peak, exponential tails\n") ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` [1] " laplace: Sharp peak, exponential tails\n" ``` ::: ```{.r .cell-code} print(" invgauss: Positive, near-normal shape\n") ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` [1] " invgauss: Positive, near-normal shape\n" ``` ::: ```{.r .cell-code} print(" amoroso: Generalized, maximum flexibility\n") ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` [1] " amoroso: Generalized, maximum flexibility\n" ``` ::: ```{.r .cell-code} print(" cauchy: Heavy-tailed, rare cases\n") ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` [1] " cauchy: Heavy-tailed, rare cases\n" ``` ::: ::: --- ## GPD Tail Augmentation ### Unconditional with GPD ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} # Data with tail behavior data("nc_pos_tail200_k4", package = "DPmixGPD") y_tail <- nc_pos_tail200_k4$y # Build with GPD bundle_gpd <- DPmixGPD::build_nimble_bundle( y = y_tail, kernel = "gamma", backend = "sb", GPD = TRUE, components = 6, mcmc = mcmc ) fit_gpd <- load_or_fit("quickstart-basic-model-compile-run-fit_gpd", run_mcmc_bundle_manual(bundle_gpd, show_progress = FALSE)) print("\nGPD augmentation applied to tail region.\n") summary(fit_gpd) ``` ::: --- ## Summary of Key Functions | Phase | Function | Input | Output | |-------|----------|-------|--------| | **1. Bundle** | `DPmixGPD::build_nimble_bundle()` | y, X (optional), kernel, backend, GPD, components | `dpmixgpd_bundle` | | **2. MCMC** | `run_mcmc_bundle_manual()` | bundle | `mixgpd_fit` | --- ## Common Parameter Settings ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} print("=== Recommended MCMC Parameters ===\n") ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` [1] "=== Recommended MCMC Parameters ===\n" ``` ::: ```{.r .cell-code} print("Quick test: niter=500, nburnin=100, nchains=1\n") ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` [1] "Quick test: niter=500, nburnin=100, nchains=1\n" ``` ::: ```{.r .cell-code} print("Standard: niter=1000, nburnin=250, nchains=2\n") ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` [1] "Standard: niter=1000, nburnin=250, nchains=2\n" ``` ::: ```{.r .cell-code} print("Production: niter=1000, nburnin=250, nchains=3\n") ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` [1] "Production: niter=1000, nburnin=250, nchains=3\n" ``` ::: ```{.r .cell-code} print("\n=== Backend Parameters ===\n") ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` [1] "\n=== Backend Parameters ===\n" ``` ::: ```{.r .cell-code} print("Use components=3-5 for both backends in this implementation.\n") ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` [1] "Use components=3-5 for both backends in this implementation.\n" ``` ::: ```{.r .cell-code} print("\n=== Kernel Selection ===\n") ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` [1] "\n=== Kernel Selection ===\n" ``` ::: ```{.r .cell-code} print("Positive data: gamma, lognormal, invgauss\n") ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` [1] "Positive data: gamma, lognormal, invgauss\n" ``` ::: ```{.r .cell-code} print("Any real data: normal\n") ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` [1] "Any real data: normal\n" ``` ::: ```{.r .cell-code} print("Symmetric tails: laplace\n") ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` [1] "Symmetric tails: laplace\n" ``` ::: ```{.r .cell-code} print("Extreme outliers: cauchy\n") ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` [1] "Extreme outliers: cauchy\n" ``` ::: ::: --- ## Next Steps - Move to **ex06-ex07** for unconditional models (CRP vs SB backends) - Move to **ex08-ex09** for tail modeling with GPD - Move to **ex10-ex13** for conditional models with covariates - Move to **Examples ex14-ex19** for causal inference workflows --- ## Workflow Navigation - Previous: [introduction](introduction.html) - Next: [backends-and-workflow](backends-and-workflow.html) - Workflow index: [Roadmap](../roadmap.html) - Practical entry: [Examples](../Examples/index.html)
